calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Discharged

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Discharged

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-24-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Glenn M. Goffin, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Advanced Employment Services, Inc.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Crestline Meetings, Inc. and Sandra Levin.

Defult of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-50 dismissed without prejudice.
Attorney for Plaintiff will Dismiss Defendant THE CRISTLINE GROUP.
Witness: Isabella Schwarzinger Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $25,370.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $18,514.60
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $497.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $47,206.60
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit Judgment for court's signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-05-2012 Set For Order To Show Cause On Feb-05-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-02-2012 Continued To Dec-19-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
